name: vibespec-viewer
description: Modular source for the VibeSpec viewer. Build inlines src/ into a single self-contained assets/viewer.html.

scripts.test: node tests/run-tests.mjs && node tests/tree.test.mjs && node tests/rebase.test.mjs && node tests/product-map.test.mjs && node tests/workspace.test.mjs && node tests/change-plan.test.mjs && node tests/sot-query.test.mjs && node tests/content-review.test.mjs && node tests/migration.test.mjs && node tests/inspect.test.mjs && node tests/merge.test.mjs && node tests/embed-sot.test.mjs && node tests/host-smoke.mjs && node tests/installed-plugin-smoke.mjs
scripts.check: node build.mjs && node --check .build/app.js && node tests/run-tests.mjs && node tests/tree.test.mjs && node tests/rebase.test.mjs && node tests/product-map.test.mjs && node tests/workspace.test.mjs && node tests/change-plan.test.mjs && node tests/sot-query.test.mjs && node tests/content-review.test.mjs && node tests/migration.test.mjs && node tests/inspect.test.mjs && node tests/merge.test.mjs && node tests/embed-sot.test.mjs && node tests/plugin-contract.mjs && node tests/host-smoke.mjs && node tests/installed-plugin-smoke.mjs
scripts.check:browser: node tests/browser-flow.mjs && node tests/browser-initiative.mjs && node tests/browser-map.mjs && node tests/browser-file-connection.mjs
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:browser
